Cross-Reference: Overlap Analysis

🔥 Projects on BOTH Lists (Hype + Money)

Project Trendshift Rank TrustMRR Context Why It Wins
PostHog #4 (33.1k ⭐) Product analytics powerhouse Open-source + self-hostable = dev trust. Product-led growth.
Postiz Trending in agentic social #14 ($97k MRR, 16% growth) Open-source social scheduler riding the AI agent wave
AI Video/Image Generation (Stagehand + Vid.AI/Speel) #9, #15 (browser+media) Vid.AI $94.7k, Speel $65.8k AI content creation is both hyped AND monetizing

Note: Low overlap this cycle — GitHub trending is dominated by Claude Code ecosystem tooling (dev-focused, open-source), while TrustMRR is dominated by bootstrapped SaaS in healthcare, SEO, and creator tools. These are different audiences.

💰 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About (TrustMRR Only)

  1. Stan ($3.57M MRR) — Creator economy platform. Massive revenue, zero GitHub presence. Props-based monetization for streamers/creators.
  2. TrimRx ($316k MRR, 12% growth) — Telehealth GLP-1 weight loss programs. Riding the Ozempic wave with software-enabled prescription services.
  3. Kibu ($234k MRR) — Niche healthtech for I/DD provider orgs. B2B SaaS in a severely underserved vertical. 48-state footprint.
  4. Supliful ($197k MRR) — Creator-to-CPG brand platform. Unique model: turn creators into consumer product brand owners with zero upfront costs.
  5. Dealsourcr ($155k MRR, 24% growth) — Real estate tech. Quietly growing fast, likely riding property data demand.

🚀 Trending With Zero Monetization (Trendshift Only — Opportunity)

  1. CLAUDE.md files / Agent skills collections (81k+ ⭐) — Pure open-source knowledge curation. Opportunity: premium curated skill packs, enterprise onboarding, consulting.
  2. build-your-own-x (494.8k ⭐) — Educational mega-repo. Opportunity: interactive course platform, coding bootcamp spinoff.
  3. Computer-Use Agent infra (14.1k ⭐) — Sandbox/SDK for desktop-controlling AI. Opportunity: managed hosting, enterprise agent deployment platform.
  4. ml-intern (5.9k ⭐) — Open-source ML engineer agent. Opportunity: hosted ML pipeline service, enterprise version.
  5. Design.md brand systems (64.5k ⭐) — Design spec files for AI coding. Opportunity: marketplace for premium design systems, enterprise custom design packs.

Key Patterns

  1. Claude Code ecosystem explosion — 6+ trending repos are Claude Code skills/configs/frameworks. This is becoming the dominant AI coding agent platform. Anthropic is winning the agent tooling war through community, not just capability.

  2. AI SEO / AI search visibility is the new SEO — SEOBOT ($72k MRR, 8%), SEO Stack ($66k, 5%), AEO Engine ($54k, 8%), Launch Club (Reddit marketing for AI search) — an entire category emerging around "how do you rank in ChatGPT/Perplexity answers?"

  3. Healthtech is quietly printing — TrimRx ($316k), Kibu ($234k), Hormone prescribing ($150k). GLP-1 telehealth especially is a gold rush. These businesses have zero tech hype but strong unit economics.

  4. Creator → business owner pipeline — Stan ($3.6M MRR), Supliful ($197k), DM Champ ($188k). Tools that help creators monetize (beyond ads) are the biggest revenue category on TrustMRR.

  5. 168% growth stealth ad AI agent — Some unnamed company doing Google/Meta ad management with AI agents at $66k MRR growing 168%. This is the highest growth rate on the board. AI-powered ad optimization is about to eat traditional media buying.

Quick Takes

  • Build for Claude Code if you want GitHub stars; build for health/creator niches if you want revenue. The hype/revenue gap is enormous this cycle.
  • AI SEO is the new "mobile-first" — within 12 months, every SEO tool will have an "AI visibility" module. Building pure-play AI SEO tools now is like building mobile-only apps in 2012.
  • The most interesting number this week: $3.57M MRR from Stan. A creator monetization platform making more than most YC companies, with zero developer mindshare. The best businesses are often invisible to the tech crowd.

Sources: trendshift.io, trustmrr.com — fetched 2026-04-26T01:00 UTC
